query_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 3 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

part_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 3 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 3 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

asynchronous_metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 3 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

trace_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 1 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

query_thread_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 1 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

query_views_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 1 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

processors_profile_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 1 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900

zookeeper_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_time + INTERVAL 1 DAY SETTINGS merge_with_ttl_timeout = 900
